headline: Tornadoes SLAY 6 Incl. Boy 12 рҹҳұрҹҢӘпёҸрҹ’Ҙ MI/OK Carnage
text:
TWISTER GANG рҹҢӘпёҸрҹҳҲрҹ’Ё DROPPED the HAMMER рҹ”Ёрҹ’Ҙ on Michigan рҹҸӯрҹҚҶ and Oklahoma рҹӨ рҹҗҺ, YEETING 6 SOULS вҳ пёҸрҹҷҸ to the RAINBOW BRIDGE рҹҢҲрҹҚҖ вҖ“ incl. THICC lil' homie Silas Anderson рҹ§’рҹ’”, 12yo Michigan MVP who peaced out surrounded by fam рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§вҖҚрҹ‘Ұрҹҳў in Edwardsburg! Four BODIED in southern MI рҹҚ‘рҹҢӘпёҸ, two ZAPPED in OK рҹ‘»вҡЎ near Beggs, with DOZENS HURT рҹҳ©рҹҡ‘ and rescue squads STILL DIGGIN' thru the WRECKAGE рҹҸҡпёҸрҹ”Қ like post-rave cleanup рҹҚҫрҹ’Ұ!

Storms went FULL BEAST MODE рҹҗәрҹҢӘпёҸ, UPROOTING TREES рҹҢірҹӘ“, SNAPPIN' POWER LINES вҡЎрҹ’Ҙ, SMASHIN' BUILDINGS рҹҸўрҹ”Ё, and RIPPIN' ROOFS OFF HOUSES рҹҸ рҹҚ‘ FLYIN' like Dorothy's crib in Oz рҹ§№рҹӣё! NWS рҹ“Ўвҡ пёҸ yellin' MORE THUNDERBANGERS вӣҲпёҸрҹ”Ҙ and FLASH FLOODS рҹҢҠрҹҡ« from Great Plains рҹҗҙрҹҢҫ to Texas рҹӨ рҹҢө thru the weekend вҖ“ STAY WOKE, peeps! рҹҳ°рҹ‘Җ

Branch County MI SHERIFF рҹӣЎпёҸрҹҡ” SPILLIN' TEA вҳ•: THREE KIA near Union City рҹҢӘпёҸрҹ“Қ, 12 INJURED рҹҳөвҖҚрҹ’«, power OUTAGES рҹ–Өрҹҡ« and ROAD BLOCKS рҹҡ§ expected вҖ“ VIDEOS droppin' MASSIVE WHIRLWIND PORN рҹҢӘпёҸрҹҚҶрҹ’Ё with DEBRIS BOMBS рҹ’ЈрҹӘЁ flyin' thru Three Rivers parking lots рҹ…ҝпёҸрҹҢҖ! Local mama bear рҹҗ»вҖҚвқ„пёҸрҹ‘© tellin' BBC/CBS: 'Saw that funnel CUMMIN' STRAIGHT AT MY BABY GIRL рҹ‘¶рҹ’Ё, fam crib, but God had the ULTIMATE SHIELD рҹӣЎпёҸвңЁ вҖ“ GRATEFUL AF рҹҷҢ!'

Cass County рҹҡЁ: ONE DEAD рҹ’Җ, HOMES & POLE BARNS рҹҸҳпёҸрҹҡң TOTALED рҹӨҜрҹ—‘пёҸ, HUNDREDS BLACKED OUT рҹ–ӨрҹҳӨ! Gov Gretchen Whitmer рҹ’Әрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ’ј activated EMERGENCY MODE рҹҡЁрҹ”Ҙ for Branch/Cass/St Joseph counties: 'Heart BROKEN рҹ’” for fams who lost legends рҹ•ҠпёҸ and hurt Michiganders вҖ“ teams ON IT like Elon on Mars рҹҡҖрҹӣё!'

OK side? Emergency boss Jeff Moore рҹҰёвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ё racin' to clear 4-MILE DAMAGE PATH рҹӣЈпёҸрҹ’Ҙ in Okmulgee (30mi south of Tulsa рҹҺёрҹӨ ), TWO DROPPED in Beggs рҹҳўвҡ°пёҸ! Gov Kevin Stitt рҹҗҺрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’ј declared STATE OF EMERGENCY рҹ“ңрҹҡЁ for Alfalfa/Creek/Grant/Major/Okmulgee/Rogers/Tulsa/Wagoner вҖ“ 'Oklahomans GETTIN' ALL THE BACKUP рҹӣЎпёҸрҹ’° post-storm SLAP!'

Mother Nature THROWIN' HISSY FITS рҹҢӘпёҸрҹҳЎ across US рҹҮәрҹҮёрҹ—әпёҸ, but first responders SLAYIN' recovery like Avengers assemble рҹҰёвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҰёвҖҚвҷҖпёҸрҹ”Ҙ вҖ“ prayers UP for the fallen angels рҹ‘јрҹ’” and survivors HOLDIN' STRONG рҹ’ӘрҹҷҸ! No cap, stay safe out there, fam вҖ“ tornadoes don't play fair вҡ”пёҸрҹҢӘпёҸ!
